title: Come here often
description: A little building mixed with a little more QOL
body:
## What am I?
A mix of several quality-of-life mods and building-related mods-- all to craft a lovely, aesthetic experience for you to enjoy! Make your favourite kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, houses... Whatever you want!

This modpack is built with the modern Japanese aesthetic in mind for you to make the townscape of your dreams. Not interested in the modern Japanese aesthetic? Well, that's alright! There's plenty of blocks for you to choose from, regardless of whatever style you want to build in!


### Mod list
- Yuushya & Yuushya Modelling (check out their [official site](https://yuushya.com/t/index-en.html) for more details on how to use Yuushya Modelling and their resource pack's inbuilt CITs)
- Macaw's Furniture, Roofs, Stairs
- Oh The Biomes We've Gone
- Dramatic Doors
- Handcrafted
- Beautify
- Clutter
- CITResewn
- RPRenames (for your CIT browsing convenience!)
 
...and much, much more!

We've also included mods like Axiom and WorldEdit just to make your building life a heck of a lot easier. Or at least, a little more streamlined.



### Recommended add-ons
Though not necessary, here are some recommended resource packs and custom item textures (CITs) to use in tandem with this modpack:
- Any invisible item frame resource pack
- [Mizuno's 16 Craft](https://mizunomcmemo.blogspot.com/p/cit.html) by m_sebascha
- [Hananacraft](https://0linghana0.wixsite.com/hanathebanana/minecraft) by HanaTheBanana 
- [Heritage CIT](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/heritage-cit/) by HanaTheBanana
- [moondrop](https://moondropcit-java.carrd.co) by ikuyuk! 
- [kaydicraft](https://kaydicraft.carrd.co) by kaydibee
- [PBG's Garden Breeze](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/pbg-s-garden-breeze-cit-pack/) by pinkgummibaerchen
- [PBG's Granny's Corner](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/pgb-s-granny-s-corner-cit-pack/) by pinkgummibaerchen
- [MiniaTuria](https://miniaturia.club) by MiniaTuriaR



### Disclaimer
This modpack is made for my friends and I to play. I'm uploading it onto Modrinth to save us the trouble of manually updating each mod. With that being said, this modpack was made with Creative mode in mind. I DO NOT recommend playing this in survival mode, but you could if you really wanted to!

For any issues, feel free to contact me via Discord at @dragussy


## Known issues
> Certain CITs will have missing textures 

Fix: Enable 'broken paths' in CITResewn's config. This may not necessarily fix every missing texture, but it'll restore a good portion of it. If enabling broken paths do not work, you could try unofficial fixes on PMC (for Heritage CIT and moondrop).

> Long loading/booting times

I'm so sorry to say, but I have no idea how to make it boot any faster. If you have any idea, feel free to drop me a DM on Discord (@dragussy), because I'm stumped
